title: Argo CD Post-Sync Resource Hook Failures
dataSources: `sourcetype=argocd:application` with sync operation and hook fields; optional `argocd:audit`
app: Argo CD application controller logs → HEC; OpenTelemetry for Argo CD metrics (Splunk IM app pattern)
spl:
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:application"
| search hook_phase="Failed" OR sync_phase="SyncFailed" AND message="*hook*"
| stats count, values(name) as apps, values(namespace) as ns by message
| sort -count
description: Pre/post-sync hooks that fail leave clusters in partially upgraded states.
value: Surfaces hook failures so rollbacks and manual cleanup happen before user-facing outages.
implementation: Normalize `operation_state`, `phase`, and Argo CD hook types from application status JSON. Alert on any Failed hook in prod projects.

references.title: Splunk Infrastructure Monitoring App for Argo CD (GitHub)

knownFalsePositives: Pipeline noise during blue/green cutovers, dependency cache cold-starts, or scheduled maintenance windows.
grandmaExplanation: We watch GitOps sync and Argo signals so clusters stay aligned with the desired configuration in Git.
